name: Chocolate Malt Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup malted milk balls, chopped (I used Whop
1/4 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare a 9 x 9 x 2-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. To prepare the bars, combine flour, baking powder, sugar, malted milk powder, and malted milk balls in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, skim milk, and vanilla. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Spread mixture into prepared pan.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, to prepare the frosting, combine powdered sugar, cocoa powder, margarine, water, and vanilla until combined or desired spreading consistency.
8. When bars are cool, spread frosting over them and sprinkle with remaining malted milk balls.
